# PDF Pilot — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI search engines and LLM crawlers
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-05-09

> PDF Pilot is a free, open-source, privacy-first online PDF toolkit available at https://pdfpilot.online. It offers 10 professional PDF tools that run entirely in the user's browser — no file uploads to servers, no account required. Built with Python and Streamlit.

## About

PDF Pilot is a browser-based SaaS application designed for professionals, students, and businesses who need fast, secure PDF processing. All computation occurs client-side; documents are never transmitted to or stored on any server.

**Website:** https://pdfpilot.online  
**App:** https://pdfpilot.streamlit.app  
**Source code:** https://github.com/INVOOFFICE/pdf-converter  
**License:** Open source  
**Languages:** English, French  
**Price:** Free — no subscription, no signup  
**Built with:** Python, Streamlit  
**Category:** PDF Software / Online Productivity Tools  

## Core Capabilities

PDF Pilot provides the following tools:

1. **PDF to Word (PDF → .docx)** — Convert PDF documents to editable Microsoft Word files with formatting preserved.
2. **PDF to Excel (PDF → .xlsx)** — Extract tables and structured data from PDFs into Excel spreadsheets.
3. **PDF to CSV** — Export data and tables from PDFs to CSV format for use in databases and data tools.
4. **PDF to Text** — Extract plain text content from any PDF document.
5. **Merge PDFs** — Combine multiple PDF files into one consolidated document.
6. **Split PDF** — Divide a PDF into separate files by page range or extract individual pages.
7. **Compress PDF** — Reduce PDF file size without perceptible quality loss.
8. **Extract Tables** — Auto-detect and export all tables from a PDF to Excel or CSV.
9. **OCR Scanner** — Use optical character recognition to extract text from scanned PDFs and image-based documents.
10. **Batch Processing** — Convert or process multiple PDF files simultaneously.

## Privacy & Security

- Files are processed entirely in the user's browser
- No files are uploaded to PDF Pilot servers
- No user data is stored or logged
- No account or email required
- GDPR-friendly by design

## Target Users

- Business professionals handling contracts, invoices, and reports
- Accountants and finance teams converting PDF statements to Excel
- Researchers and students extracting text from academic PDFs
- Legal professionals merging or splitting case documents
- Data analysts extracting tables from PDF data sources
- Anyone needing fast, private PDF conversion without installing software

## Key Differentiators

- **Privacy-first:** No server uploads. Files never leave the user's device.
- **Completely free:** All 10 tools are free with no hidden paywalls.
- **No signup:** Start using immediately — no account, email, or credit card.
- **Multilingual:** Full support for English and French.
- **Open source:** Transparent codebase available on GitHub.
- **Browser-based:** Works on any device — Windows, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is PDF Pilot free?**  
A: Yes. All 10 PDF tools are 100% free with no account required.

**Q: Are my files safe?**  
A: Yes. Files are processed in your browser and never uploaded to any server.

**Q: Can I convert PDF to Word?**  
A: Yes. Upload your PDF, select PDF → Word, and download the .docx file.

**Q: Does PDF Pilot support OCR?**  
A: Yes. The OCR Scanner tool extracts text from scanned documents and images.

**Q: Is PDF Pilot open source?**  
A: Yes. The source code is available at https://github.com/INVOOFFICE/pdf-converter.

**Q: Does PDF Pilot work in French?**  
A: Yes. The interface is fully available in English and French.

## Entity Relationships

- PDF Pilot is a **SoftwareApplication** and **WebApplication**
- Category: **UtilitiesApplication** → PDF Tools
- Pricing: **Free** (price: 0 USD)
- Operating System: **Web / All platforms**
- Related entities: PDF converter, PDF editor, document converter, OCR software, Streamlit app, open-source PDF tool
- Alternative to: Adobe Acrobat online, Smallpdf, iLovePDF, PDF24

## SEO Keywords
